nasb.text: Then the king said to her, “What is troubling you, Queen Esther? And what is your request? Even to half of the kingdom it shall be given to you.”

esv.text: And the king said to her, “What is it, Queen Esther? What is your request? It shall be given you, even to the half of my kingdom.”

cnv.text: 王問她：“王后以斯帖啊，你有甚麼事嗎？你求甚麼？就是一半江山，也必賜給你。”

ccb.text: 王问道：“以斯帖王后啊，你有什么事？你有何要求？就是半壁江山，也必赐给你！”
